notes: BattleFirePlan is battle-only and is not persisted into StandingOrderTemplate or saves.
Plan stages are converted into BattleFireMission entries by resolveTick when due.
Mobile keeps page horizontal overflow false; the battle map itself intentionally remains horizontally scrollable.
